_meta.description: Polish options and code recipes for Phase 3. Claude presents these as a menu instead of guessing what to do.

quickWins.name: Realistic Mock Data
quickWins.desc: Replace generic data with names, prices, dates that match the business
quickWins.how: Swap mock.ts data arrays with domain-specific realistic values from mock-data-sets.json

quickWins.name: Empty States
quickWins.desc: Add friendly 'nothing here yet' messages when lists are empty
quickWins.how: Wrap DataTable/ListItem sections with: if data.length === 0 → <EmptyState icon={...} title='...' subtitle='...' />

quickWins.name: Status Badges
quickWins.how: Add colored spans in DataTable cells: green (#22c55e) for active/completed, yellow (#eab308) for pending, red (#ef4444) for cancelled

quickWins.name: Page Titles + Subtitles
quickWins.desc: Add PageHeader with a title and helpful subtitle on every page
quickWins.how: Add <PageHeader title='...' subtitle='...' /> at top of each page

quickWins.name: Trend Arrows on Stats
quickWins.desc: Show green up-arrows and red down-arrows on StatCards
quickWins.how: StatCard already supports trend prop — just add realistic trend values

mediumEffort.name: Branded Header
mediumEffort.desc: Add the business name + logo area to the shell header
mediumEffort.how: Customize shell's appName and add a gradient accent bar

mediumEffort.name: Action Buttons
mediumEffort.desc: Add 'New Order', 'Add Customer' etc buttons that show a toast or modal
mediumEffort.how: Add buttons to PageHeader actions prop, wire to simple alert() or state toggle

mediumEffort.name: Metric Row
mediumEffort.desc: Add a compact row of secondary stats below the main stat cards
mediumEffort.how: Add <MetricRow items={[...]} /> between StatCards and main content

mediumEffort.name: Chart Variety
mediumEffort.desc: Add a second chart type (line, area, or pie) for visual interest
mediumEffort.how: Add another <ChartCard type='pie' ... /> with different data slice

mediumEffort.name: Search Bar
mediumEffort.desc: Add a filter/search input above tables
mediumEffort.how: Add state + input above DataTable, filter data array on change

advancedPolish.name: Tab Navigation
advancedPolish.desc: Add tabs within a page (e.g., All / Active / Completed)
advancedPolish.how: Add state-driven tab buttons, filter displayed data by selected tab

advancedPolish.name: Detail Drill-Down
advancedPolish.desc: Click a table row to see a detail view
advancedPolish.how: Add onClick to rows, show DetailCard in a conditional panel or new route

advancedPolish.name: Animations
advancedPolish.desc: Add fade-in and slide-up on page load
advancedPolish.how: CSS keyframes + animation classes (no Framer Motion needed)

advancedPolish.name: Dark Mode Toggle
advancedPolish.desc: Add a sun/moon toggle to switch between light and dark
advancedPolish.how: CSS variables swap, state in shell, save to localStorage
